entities.name: ECOSYSTEM SERVICES
entities.description: Bundles of natural processes and functions essential for human well-being, subsistence, and livelihoods

entities.name: GREEN REVOLUTION
entities.description: A period of agricultural innovation and expansion that significantly impacted the agricultural landscape in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study on agricultural expansion and ecosystem service values was conducted

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM SERVICE VALUES
entities.description: The estimated monetary value of ecosystem services, measured in Billion US$

entities.name: VALUE TRANSFER APPROACHES
entities.description: Methods used to estimate spatiotemporal ecosystem service values

entities.name: COEFFICIENT OF SENSITIVITY
entities.description: A metric used to analyze the sensitivity of ecosystem services to land conversion

entities.name: COEFFICIENT OF ELASTICITY
entities.description: A metric used to analyze the elasticity of ecosystem services to land conversion

entities.name: GEOGRAPHICALLY WEIGHTED REGRESSION MODEL
entities.description: A model used to explore the cumulative and individual effects of driving factors on ecosystem service values

entities.name: TOTAL CROP AREA
entities.description: An explanatory factor used to analyze its effect on ecosystem service values

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: An explanatory factor used to analyze its effect on ecosystem service values

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: An explanatory factor used to analyze its effect on ecosystem service values

entities.name: NET IRRIGATED AREA
entities.description: An explanatory factor used to analyze its effect on ecosystem service values

entities.name: CROPPING INTENSITY
entities.description: An explanatory factor used to analyze its effect on ecosystem service values

entities.name: MULTI-LAYER PERCEPTRON BASED ARTIFICIAL NEURAL NETWORK
entities.description: A machine learning approach used to estimate the normalized importance of explanatory factors

entities.name: LINEAR REGRESSION MODELING
entities.description: A statistical method used to assess linear associations between driving factors and ecosystem services

entities.name: WATER REGULATION
entities.description: A category of ecosystem service that provided the highest estimated ecosystem service values

entities.name: SOIL FORMATION
entities.description: A category of ecosystem service contributing to ecosystem service values

entities.name: SOIL-WATER RETENTION
entities.description: A category of ecosystem service contributing to ecosystem service values

entities.name: BIODIVERSITY MAINTENANCE
entities.description: A category of ecosystem service contributing to ecosystem service values

entities.name: WASTE TREATMENT
entities.description: A category of ecosystem service contributing to ecosystem service values

entities.name: CLIMATE REGULATION
entities.description: A category of ecosystem service contributing to ecosystem service values

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS REGULATION
entities.description: A category of ecosystem service contributing to ecosystem service values

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL EXPANSION
entities.description: The expansion of agricultural land led by the Green Revolution
